title: Vietnam says AES Corp intends to develop $13-billion wind farm
text: U.S.-based energy utility AES Corp plans to develop a major offshore wind farm in Vietnam, the Southeast Asian country said on Friday, that could potentially double the country's wind power capacity.

title: These 10 stocks from a sector that is a bear-market bulwark have upside potential of up to 30%
text: During times of uncertainty, it can help to look at what happened during other down cycles for stocks.

title: AES Announces Second Quarter 2022 Financial Review Conference Call to be Held on Friday, August 5, 2022 at 10:00 a.m. ET
text: ARLINGTON, Va. , July 5, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) will host a conference call on Friday, August 5, 2022 at 10:00 a.m.
